name: cc-config
description: Layer 1/5 of the cc-* harness — setup. The front desk that installs and maintains the harness itself. /cc-init walks you through onboarding: recommended rules, the cheat-sheet reminder hook, and a stale-docs check. Commands only — you run them, the model can't. Install this first; it bootstraps the other four layers (cc-tools, cc-pipeline, cc-worker, cc-chief).
